name: @act-spec/example-701-large-docs-docusaurus
description: PRD-701 reference example: Tinybox SDK docs — a large Docusaurus 3.x documentation site (200-500 ACT nodes, 4-level sidebar hierarchy) that validates clean against PRD-600 with achieved.level === 'standard'.
